arts.ttl: WATCH: Laporta has a word with Raphinha after Olmo comments
arts.sum: Raphinha spoke out about the current situation at Barcelona on Tuesday regarding Dani Olmo and Pau Victor and the fact the duo can’t play for the club currently due to registration issues. Shortly afterwards, Barcelona went out to train and club president Joan Laporta was spotted having a quiet word in Raphinha’s ear before the session.

arts.ttl: ‘Blown away’ – Nico Williams admits to being surprised by talents of Barcelona starlet
arts.sum: Athletic Club star Nico Williams has this week moved to reveal his appreciation for the talents of a member of the midfield ranks at upcoming opponents Barcelona. The player in…

arts.ttl: Team News: Athletic Bilbao vs. Barcelona injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Supercopa de Espana clash between Athletic Bilbao and Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Surprise stat: Barcelona have been more successful with one player off the pitch than on it this season
arts.sum: A surprising statistic surrounding the endeavours of La Liga giants Barcelona with and without the contributions of Dani Olmo across the season to date has come to the fore online.…

arts.ttl: Raphinha says Olmo situation could deter players from joining Barca
arts.sum: Raphinha also said he’s hoping that the situation will be resolved soon and that the two players can return to action. The two players are currently ineligible to play for Barcelona, although the club are hoping to get the duo re-registered for the rest of the season.

arts.ttl: Dani Olmo re-registration saga will make players 'THINK TWICE' before signing for Barcelona, claims Raphinha - with Spanish star still unable to play for Catalan giants amid financial issues
arts.sum: Barcelona star Raphinha has claimed the saga surrounding Dani Olmo's re-registration could impact the club's transfer business in the future.

arts.ttl: Flick, Deco & Laporta agree on Barcelona’s transfer priority for January

arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Important player seeking to force move to European giants this window?
arts.sum: Barcelona defender Ronald Araujo is reportedly pushing for a loan move to Juventus this January after falling down the pecking order at the club.

arts.ttl: Barcelona's Raphinha: Olmo saga could affect future transfers
arts.sum: "I think it could," Raphinha said in a news conference on Tuesday when asked if the situation could force players to turn down the chance of signing for Barça. Olmo and Víctor were both unregistered on Jan. 1 after Barça missed a Dec. 31 deadline to prove they are compliant with LaLiga's financial fair play regulations.
